gist.headline: Catching digital dreams
gist.blurb: DSEA just landed in the greenhouse! It's an AI-powered dream journal that helps you record and visualize your midnight adventures.
gist.summary: Added DSEA, an AI-powered dream journal web app, to the community showcase under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use DSEA to record and visualize their dreams using pollinations.ai infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: A dream journal theme. Polly the bee sleeping or writing in a journal with dream-like elements (clouds, stars, thought bubbles) to represent the DSEA dream journal app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, sleeping peacefully on a fluffy cloud while a glowing dream journal rests nearby. A thought bubble above her shows a tiny pixelated starry night sky. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and deep lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
